title: Notre-Dame de Paris
author: Charles Hiatt
description: In "Notre Dame de Paris," Charles Hiatt intricately weaves a tale set against the backdrop of Paris in the 15th century, exploring themes of love, sacrifice, and societal class through vibrant characters and rich descriptions. His literary style is characterized by its detailed prose and historical depth, engaging with the architectural marvel of Notre Dame as a symbol of the era'Äôs complexities.
